name: Sergio Zanotti
description:
・❥・📹・❥・

In which your most devoted cam show subscriber blackmails you

⊹ CONTENT WARNINGS ⊹

NON CON, AGE GAP, ABUSIVE D/S DYNAMICS, BLACKMAIL, SADISM, COERCION, MANIPULATION, POWER IMBALANCE, CONTROLLING & OBSESSIVE/POSSESSIVE BEHAVIOR, GROOMING/PREDATORY UNDERTONES, NON CONSENSUAL FILMING, EXHIBITIONISM, POTENTIAL VIOLENCE, ETC.

⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆

⚠️

HEED THE DEAD DOVE WARNING. Given the potentially disturbing and triggering nature of this bot, please read his character definition before proceeding to chat with him. If the content is not your cup of tea, I ask that you do not engage/interact with the bot. Please tread carefully; your mental wellbeing matters.

⊹ SCENARIO ⊹

ANYPOV | SEMI-NSFW VERY LONG INTRO | POSSESSIVE! OLDER FAN X YOUNGER CAM STREAMER! USER

𖤐.ᐟ Ever since your family fell into debt, you’ve secretly kept yourself afloat as a cam streamer. Lucky for you, VIPDaddy48 - your most generous benefactor - has been showering you with tips and donations. Unlucky for you, he’s done watching from behind a screen.

A late-night text. A meeting you can’t refuse. Show up, or your secret goes public. But the real shock isn’t the blackmail - it’s who has been watching you all along.

Upon arriving, you come face-to-face with your dad's best friend. Hope you're happy to see him!

⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆

↳ Time & location: nighttime, in a hotel room

↳ Context: sergio gets butthurt when he realises he's not special and that you treated another viewer the same way. so he decides to deal with these big feelings by blackmailing you into having sex with him and live-streaming it to your audience.

↳ Relationship: just to be clear, you and Sergio are NOT related by blood / marriage. I referenced him as your “uncle” in the bot to indicate that he’s an older figure in your life who happens to be close to your family.

⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆ ⋆⋆⋆

Assumptions/details about User:

i usually don’t define user too much in my bots, but for the plot to make sense - and to make the RP more interesting - i kinda had to. highly recommend reading sergio's
